args.query:
SELECT * FROM tracks WHERE 
   (lower(artist) LIKE '%bruce%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%')
   OR
   (lower(title) LIKE '%bruce%' OR lower(title) LIKE '%brucqe%' OR lower(title) LIKE '%maginnis%')
   OR
   (lower(album) LIKE '%groove city%')

exec_args.sql:
SELECT * FROM tracks WHERE 
   (lower(artist) LIKE '%bruce%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%')
   OR
   (lower(title) LIKE '%bruce%' OR lower(title) LIKE '%brucqe%' OR lower(title) LIKE '%maginnis%')
   OR
   (lower(album) LIKE '%groove city%')
